hero.title: Packers & Movers in Telangana
hero.subtitle: Hyderabad to Warangal, Karimnagar to Nizamabad — 2,805+ verified movers across Telangana.

intro:
Telangana is one of India's fastest-growing states, with Hyderabad leading as a global IT and pharma hub. ShiftIndia connects you with 2,805+ verified movers across Hyderabad, Warangal, Karimnagar, Khammam, Mahbubnagar and Nizamabad.

From Hyderabad's Hitech City and Gachibowli tech corridors to the emerging industrial zones of Warangal and Karimnagar, our KYC-verified vendors handle every relocation with precision, speed and full insurance coverage.
whyUs: Hyderabad's rapid apartment construction, gated community rules and the outer ring road traffic make it a city that demands specialist movers. Our Telangana vendors understand multi-floor apartment logistics, Hyderabad's peak-hour patterns, and cover the full state with GPS tracking and ₹5 lakh damage protection.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Telangana?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Telangana start at ₹3,500. Hyderabad local 2 BHK moves typically cost ₹6,000–₹12,000. Inter-city moves (e.g., Hyderabad to Warangal) cost ₹5,000–₹9,000.

faqs.q: Which cities in Telangana does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover Hyderabad, Secunderabad, Warangal, Karimnagar, Khammam, Mahbubnagar and Nizamabad across Telangana.

faqs.q: Do you cover Hyderabad's tech corridors like Hitech City and Gachibowli?
faqs.a: Yes. We cover all of Hyderabad including Hitech City, Gachibowli, Banjara Hills, Jubilee Hills, Kondapur, Madhapur, Uppal and all peripheral areas.

faqs.q: Can you move between Telangana and Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Yes. Hyderabad–Vijayawada, Hyderabad–Visakhapatnam and other Telangana–AP routes are covered with full insurance, GPS tracking and door-to-door service.
